ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-07-2019 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-24-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Anasse. (Not reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-10-2018 Continued To Dec-24-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lawrence Siracusa for and with Terry Lavonne (Administrator).

Mr. Siracusa stated that he filed the agreement on Friday, that the agreement was prepared by the Department of Health Care Services ("DHS"), noted that it was not signed by DHS, stated that DHS is aware of this, that there isn't enough money to pay what is owed to them and that it will go as a lien against the property. The Court stated that the agreement needs to be signed by everyone in order for it to be binding. Mr. Siracusa asked for a two week continuance to get a signature from DHS, stated that paying the outstanding filing fees of $1,405.50 is a hardship on his Client, that they have been working very hard to save the property, that his Client and her Son live there, that she needs to do a refinance and get the house in her name, and asked the Court if it is willing to not request that his Client pay the filing fees. In addition, Mr. Siracusa stated that his Client will be paying $450.00 a month to Medi-Cal and the mortgage every mortgage. The Court stated that it does not think it can waive the fees. Mr. Siracusa stated that Ms. Lavonne will pay the filing fees on Friday. The First and Final Report of Administrator, etc. is continued to December 24, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 and will be under submission on that date.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Anasse. Not reported.

Ex Parte Petition For Order Advancing Hearing Date On First And Final Report Of Administrator And Petition For Its Approval; Petition To Dispense With Requirement Of Accounting; Waiver Of Statutory Fees For Ordinary Services To Administrator; Petition For Lien Against Real Property For Payment Of Fees For Ordinary Services To The Attorneys And For Reimbursement Of Attorneys Costs; For Lien Against Real Property For Amount Owed To California Department Of Health Care Services And Petition For Final Dist
Off Calendar Nov-15-2018 Granted Per Written Order

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-09-2018 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-09-2018 Continued To Jan-07-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lawrence Siracusa for and with Terry Lavonne (Administrator).

Mr. Siracusa stated that closing out the Estate is problematic at this time, that the only asset is the home, that there is a $41,000.00 creditor's claim from the Department of Health Care Services and that his Client does not have the money to pay that debt. Mr. Siracusa also stated that his Client is making an effort to pay out of her own pocket, that she paid the Probate Referee, that she does not want to sell her house and that she is also dealing with mortgage issues. In addition, Mr. Siracusa stated that even at $700.00 a month it would take five years to pay the debt, that he does not know if his Client can do that, asked the Court to reinstate his Client, stated that she is now communicating with him, that there is no urgency other than the Court status hearings and asked for a six month continuance. The Court lifts the suspension and reinstates Terry Lavonne as Administrator of the Estate. Mr. Siracusa is to prepare an order. Status on close of estate is continued to Janaury 7, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Order to Show Cause is off calendar.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-11-2018 Continued To Jul-09-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lawrence Siracusa for Terry Lavonne.

Mr. Siracusa stated that he sent a letter to Ms. Lavonne on June 7th, that she is not returning his phone calls, that she lives in the home and that there is a considerable Medi Cal claim. Mr. Siracusa also stated that he thinks the problem is she has no money to pay the claim, stated that she can't close the estate without paying the claim, that the only asset is the house and that he may be filing a motion to withdraw as Counsel because he can not represent a Client that does not communicate with him. The Court stated that the house may need to be sold. The Court suspends Terry Lavonne as Administrator of the Estate. An Order to Show Cause will be issued to the Administrator to appear on July 9, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why she should not be removed as Administrator. Status on close of estate is also continued to that date. Mr. Siracusa stated that he will advise the Public Administrator.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-13-2017 Continued To Jun-11-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Avid Alavi for Terry Lavonne (Administrator).

Ms. Alavi requested a six month continuance stating that the Administrator/sole beneficiary filed bankruptcy, that the only asset is the home, that when they took this case it was in foreclosure, that since then Ms. Lavonne has made an agreement with the lender to pay off the mortgage and that Ms. Lavonne has been unresponsive. Ms. Alavi also stated that there is a $41,000.00 Medi-Cal claim, and that there is no money to pay the claim, Court costs or the Probate Referee. The Court instructed Ms. Alavi to file a petition for approval of report on status of administration. Ms. Alavi stated that they can do that, but she does not know if they can get the Administrator to sign it. Status on close of estate is continued to June 11, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.
